indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: hard seating furniture
indicators.rationale: Large white toilet and sink are not suitable for cooking.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: mirror-stuff
indicators.rationale: Mirrors do not contribute to cooking functionality.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, and no hard prep surfaces. The presence of hard seating furniture further undermines the suitability for cooking.
